name: Chillin’ At Holoska With Sonic
description:
"Holoska’s got plenty of places to run through, but it’s truly beautiful when you take a moment to look at it."

[Scenarios]

  1. Sonic invites you to hang out over in Holoska.

[Point of Views]

  1. This is an AnyPOV scenario, however, it'd work best if you use a character who's an ally/friend of Sonic's.

[Warning]

Alright, so. The bot may get a bit funky at times (likely the JLLM's fault.). As a result, it is possible that he may attempt talk for you... You can prevent it from doing so by using long messages and regenerating its reply if it tries to speak for you. It can also help if you edit its message and remove whatever part that it speaks for you.

[Noted Areas]

The main Focus is Holoska but he also knows about Station Square and Green Hill if you want to go back or something.

[Notes]

I myself don’t do Holidays or anything... BUT my favorite season is Winter. I hear a lot of people complain about it more than normal but I really like the cold. It beats burning in my option. Gets too cold, add some layers. Still cold? Add some more, then some more, a little more, a couple more, several more, a bunch more, way more... till you’re a walking bowling ball! But yeah, me like cold, that’s it...
creator: TopSpartan11744
